name: Build the Engine
stimulus: Aerobic foundation + running strength. Hill work for power. Bike for threshold. AM/PM splits with strength on Wednesdays.
goals: Strength: Wed PM after track, progressing load

planned.desc:
Easy run 8km @ 5:10
Smooth and relaxed — first day of base
planned.notes: No strength today. Fresh legs for track tomorrow. Welcome to base.

planned.desc:
Hill repeats — POWER day
WU: 2km easy + dynamic drills
MAIN: 6x200m uphill @ hard effort
(jog back down recovery — take your time)
CD: 2km easy + 4x100m flat strides
planned.notes: Find a steep-ish hill (6-8% grade). Drive the knees, pump the arms. This builds the engine that speed sits on.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy run 7km
PM: Strength 45min
Squats 3x8, Lunges 3x10
Single-leg RDL 3x8, Core circuit
planned.notes: Strength AFTER track day. Legs are pre-fatigued — use moderate load, focus on form.

planned.desc:
Zwift — Bike threshold
WU: 15min Z2
MAIN: 4x5min Z4 (3min Z1 recovery)
CD: 10min Z1
planned.notes: Hard effort on the bike. Save the legs for Saturday.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy run 7km
PM: Yoga/mobility 20min
planned.notes: Pre-long run. Short. Loose.

planned.desc:
Long run 14km
First 10km @ 5:00-5:05
Last 4km @ 4:40-4:50
Finish feeling strong, not dead
planned.notes: Negative split. If last 4km feels hard, you went out too fast.

planned.desc:
Endurance ride 2.5hrs
Outdoor or Zwift group ride
Z2 steady, enjoy the scenery
planned.notes: Active recovery from long run. Easy spin.

planned.desc:
Easy run 9km + 6x100m strides
Shake out the legs, feel smooth
planned.notes: Building. Strides should feel sharp. No strength — fresh for track tomorrow.

planned.desc:
Track — speed endurance
WU: 2km easy + drills
MAIN: 6x400m @ 84-86sec
(200m jog recovery — keep moving)
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Track Tuesday. This is 5K pace territory. Should feel fast but controlled.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy run 7km
PM: Strength 45min
Front squats 3x6, Bulgarian splits 3x8
Box jumps 3x5, Plank variations
planned.notes: Strength after track day. Moderate load, don't wreck yourself.

planned.desc:
Zwift race — B category
WU: 15min spin
RACE: 30-45min all-out
CD: 10min easy spin
planned.notes: RACE THE BIKE. This replaces a threshold run. Go hard, compete.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy run 7km
PM: Mobility 20min
planned.notes: Pre-long run. Recover from Zwift race.

planned.desc:
Long run 16km
First 11km @ 5:00
Last 5km progressive:
km12: 4:50, km13: 4:45, km14: 4:40
km15: 4:35, km16: 4:30
planned.notes: The last 5km teaches your body to run fast when tired.

planned.desc:
Long ride 2.5-3hrs
Outdoor — include some hills
Or Zwift — pick a hilly route
Z2 base, Z3 on the climbs
planned.notes: Build bike power. Hills = free strength work.

planned.desc:
Easy run 7km
(absorb week — back off slightly)
planned.notes: Easier week. Let the body absorb 2 weeks of work. Fresh for hills tomorrow.

planned.desc:
Hill sprints + tempo finish
WU: 2km easy + drills
MAIN SET 1: 10x10sec hill sprints
(full recovery walk back — these are MAXIMAL)
MAIN SET 2: 2km tempo @ 4:20-4:30
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Hill sprints = neuromuscular power. 10sec all-out, then walk back and wait until you're ready. Tempo at the end to practice running smooth when fatigued.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy run 6km
PM: Strength 40min
Deadlift 3x5, Hip thrusts 3x10
Calf raises 3x15, Core 3 rounds
Focus: posterior chain
planned.notes: Strength after hill day. Moderate — absorb week.

planned.desc:
Recovery spin
60min Z1-Z2
Flat, easy, conversation pace
planned.notes: Absorb week. Easy.

planned.desc: Easy run 6km + 4x strides
planned.notes: Pre-long run.

planned.desc:
Long run 18km
First 13km @ 5:00
Last 5km: 4:45 → 4:35 → 4:30 → 4:25 → 4:20
Finish FAST
planned.notes: Your longest run. The last km should be your fastest. This is the test.

planned.desc:
Easy recovery ride
60-90min Z1
Spin out the legs
planned.notes: Base block done. How did it go? Ready for speed.
